title: PaymentAction::Sent notification lost; session stuck in Sent forever
description: Trigger A: broadcast succeeds and session is persisted as Sent, then the relay mpsc channel closes before send_payment_message(PaymentAction::Sent) delivers → dispatch_payment returns false, loop breaks. Trigger B: MLS encryption fails inside send_payment_message (returns true, silently drops the message). In both cases: payer is in Sent state in DB with a real txid; payee is stuck in AddressProvided. On reconnect, resync_sessions handles Payer/Requested and Payee/AddressProvided only — Payer/Sent is the _ => continue arm. The Sent notification is never retransmitted. Both sessions time out at 24h with no error. The zatoshi left the wallet; the session never reaches Confirmed.
close_reason: Added Payer/Sent arm to resync_sessions; added retransmits and skipped-no-tx-hash tests
